organizations.name: Civil Rights Division
organizations.context: Assistant Attorney General in charge of the Civil Rights Division

offices.name: office of civil rights
offices.context: The head of each covered agency shall ensure that the covered agency has an office of civil rights

roles.title: Assistant Attorney General in charge of the Civil Rights Division
roles.context: the Assistant Attorney General in charge of the Civil Rights Division of the Department of Justice shall establish an interagency working group

legislation_refs.name: Eliminating Bias in Algorithmic Systems Act of 2024
legislation_refs.context: This Act may be cited as the 'Eliminating Bias in Algorithmic Systems Act of 2024'

legislation_refs.name: section 3502 of title 44, United States Code
legislation_refs.context: The term 'agency' has the meaning given the term in section 3502 of title 44, United States Code

named_docs.name: Bias, discrimination, and other harms reports
named_docs.owner_org: office of civil rights of each covered agency
named_docs.context: each office of civil rights of a covered agency shall submit to each congressional committee a report that details the state of the field and technology
